---
name: Theorem or bridge proposal
about: Propose a theorem refinement, no-go result, or new system bridge
labels: research
---

## Proposal type

- [ ] theorem refinement
- [ ] lemma or corollary
- [ ] no-go / impossibility result
- [ ] physics or application bridge
- [ ] open-problem clarification

## Exact claim or question

State the claim, theorem candidate, or bridge question as precisely as possible.

## Current status

How should this be classified right now?

- [ ] proved
- [ ] conditional
- [ ] open
- [ ] probably false
- [ ] not sure

## Why it might fit the repository

Describe the protected object, disturbance family, and correction architecture if relevant.

## What is already known

List the current repo files or outside references that are most relevant.

## What would count as success

What kind of proof, counterexample, operator construction, or limitation result would settle the issue?

## What would falsify it

If this proposal is wrong, what kind of counterexample or obstruction should we expect?
